name: Neto by Maropost Release Notes – 1 Aug 2024
body: [{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Overview"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"This release contains updates of Ecommerce versions v."},{"text":"6.302.0 ","bold":true},{"text":"to v."},{"text":"6.304.0","bold":true},{"text":"."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Enhancements and Updates","bold":true}]},{"type":"h3","children":[{"text":"Implementation of Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) in Neto","bold":true}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Neto has implemented strengthened Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) vulnerability detection on front-end and back-end pages with HTML/text input forms and fields."}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"The system will detect and cleanse input submissions with disallowed, potentially malicious scripts. Users attempting to input such scripts will be presented with the error:"}]},{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image4.068J10000038cxLIAQ.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image4.068J10000038cxLIAQ.png","name":"error message","embedType":"image","float":"none","height":70,"width":1044}}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"The automated detection can be turned off by admin users by disabling the "},{"text":"ENABLE_XSS_PROTECTION","bold":true},{"text":" config under "},{"text":"Settings & Tools","bold":true},{"text":" > "},{"text":"All Settings & Tools","bold":true},{"text":" > "},{"text":"Other","bold":true},{"text":" > "},{"text":"Advanced Configuration","bold":true},{"text":"."}]},{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/Screenshot20240731at24748PM.068J10000038cxzIAA.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/Screenshot20240731at24748PM.068J10000038cxzIAA.png","name":"enable_xss_protection","embedType":"image","float":"none","height":209,"width":1600}}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Fixes","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Process Refund UI fixed","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"In a few instances, when double-clicking the "},{"text":"Process Refund","bold":true},{"text":" button on the refund page, duplicate refund entries were getting created in the system. This has been fixed to accommodate only 1 refund entry at the time of processing the request. "}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Character Limit for Promotion Tag decreased","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Previously, the "},{"text":"Promotion Tag","bold":true},{"text":" field on the Pricing & Tax section of the product page displayed a limit of 30 characters. The UI has been updated to the correct limit of 25 characters as shown below:"}]},{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/Screenshot20240731at21352PM.068J10000038cy9IAA.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/Screenshot20240731at21352PM.068J10000038cy9IAA.png","name":"Promotion Tag Character Limit","embedType":"image","float":"none","height":296,"width":1600}},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"eWay Payment Gateway Incorrectly Reporting Unsuccessful Payments","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"In the case of payment attempts returning a "},{"text":"Timeout","bold":true},{"text":" response from the eWay payment gateway, such payments were previously marked as successful in Neto, and therefore the order would appear as fully paid even if the payment eventually failed."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"To prevent this, orders with payments returning a "},{"text":"Timeout","bold":true},{"text":" response from eWay are now put "},{"text":"On Hold","bold":true},{"text":" with a high Fraud Score to indicate that the payment outcome should be reviewed."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"AddRma API Issue Fixed","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"An issue affected the AddRma API, where the below error was returned if the RefundAmount was greater than the Product Subtotal:"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"<Message>Refund: RefundAmount XXX exceed Rma refund total of XX</Message>","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"The issue was due to the system not including the Shipping cost in the Rma refund total, and has now been resolved."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Stripe Payment Forms Failing to Load on Mobile","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"In some cases, when customers tried to pay on the checkout page using a mobile phone browser, the Stripe card payment forms did not load when selected. This issue has been fixed."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]}]
